title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 26.030 - Governor may veto appropriations — extent — exceptions
text:
26.030.  Governor may veto appropriations — extent — exceptions. — The governor may veto any item or portion of any item of any appropriation bill or the whole thereof; except that the governor shall not reduce any appropriation for free public schools or for the payment of principal and interest on the public debt.
(RSMo 1939 § 10905, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 58, A.L. 1959 H.B. 121) 
See also Const. Art. IV § 26.
